basics.description:
**IntelWatch ETIP** integrates enterprise threat intelligence with Microsoft Sentinel.

This solution deploys:
- 1 Workbook for IOC analytics and feed health monitoring
- 5 Analytics Rules for automated threat detection
- 4 Hunting Queries for proactive threat hunting

[Learn more](https://ti.intelwatch.in)

basics.name: workspace
basics.label: Log Analytics Workspace
basics.toolTip: Select the Log Analytics workspace with Microsoft Sentinel enabled.

options.text: Configure your IntelWatch ETIP connection. You will need an API key from your ETIP account at ti.intelwatch.in.

elements.name: etipApiKey
elements.toolTip: Your ETIP API key (starts with etip_). Get it from ti.intelwatch.in > Settings > API Keys.

elements.name: etipApiBaseUrl
elements.label: ETIP API Base URL
elements.toolTip: Base URL for the ETIP API. Change only if using a self-hosted instance.

options.text: After installing this solution, deploy the Azure Function data connector separately. See the data-connector/README.md for step-by-step instructions.

This solution deploys 5 analytics rules:

1. ETIP High-Confidence IOC Match (High)
2. ETIP C2 Domain Communication Detected (High)
3. New Critical Severity IOC Ingested (Medium)
4. Multiple ETIP IOC Matches on Same Host (High)
5. ETIP Feed Sync Stale (Low)

This solution deploys 4 hunting queries:

1. High-Risk ETIP IOCs Without Detections
2. Network Activity Matching ETIP Threat Actor IOCs
3. Endpoints Communicating with New Malware Family IOCs
4. Internal Hosts Matching ETIP Lateral Movement Indicators
